name: codelabs
description: Plugins for the codelabs.studio Claude Code workflow — virtual co-founder, deterministic dev servers, pre-launch audits, cross-project feature ports.

plugins.name: codelabs-cofounder
plugins.description: Virtual co-founder with skin in the game. Persistent project journal, brutally honest posture, auto-routing to specialist sub-agents (CTO, CFO, PM, QA, UX, Security).

plugins.name: codelabs-dev-servers
plugins.description: Production-grade local dev server manager. Deterministic ports across projects, optional HTTPS subdomains via embedded Caddy + mkcert. Two modes: ports (fast) or domains (HTTPS).

plugins.name: codelabs-advisors
plugins.description: Pre-launch audit suite for web projects: SEO, security (OWASP), performance (Core Web Vitals), email deliverability (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), DNS, database, accessibility.

plugins.name: codelabs-feature-port
plugins.description: Cross-project feature analysis and migration. Deeply analyzes features in any project, extracts their essence, and ports them to other projects respecting target architecture and conventions.

plugins.name: codelabs-role-empathy
plugins.description: Role empathy system for user-centered features. Identifies user roles, generates personas, validates UX per role, and pairs with journey-map for role-based test coverage.
